purpose: Record table-layout and zh-to-en expansion repair ideas that may be promoted into pdf_translation_workflow_core after spike and regression validation.

candidate_capabilities.description: Split dense table text into independent cell-like layout groups before fitting text, instead of treating a row or table as one text block.
candidate_capabilities.promotion_condition: Must be expressed as geometry-derived grouping logic, with no page-number, sample-text, or sample-value branch conditions.

candidate_capabilities.description: Bind table labels, headers, numeric values, and neighboring notes by local geometry and style evidence before allocating text regions.
candidate_capabilities.promotion_condition: Must derive role and binding from extracted spans, bbox adjacency, color, font size, and line structure.

candidate_capabilities.description: Use available whitespace and nearby obstacles to expand translated text regions when target-language text grows.
candidate_capabilities.promotion_condition: Must preserve source visual hierarchy and avoid covering charts, table rules, images, and existing non-target text.

candidate_capabilities.description: Apply local font-size floors for table cells and compact labels based on source text scale and available geometry.
candidate_capabilities.promotion_condition: Must compute thresholds from source-page distribution and target-region capacity, not from static page-specific constants.

known_blockers: round22 is not a product-quality pass.
Some pages still contain local text overlap.
Some source-relative font hierarchy gates still fail.
The experiment tools are not yet stable core entrypoints.
required_validation_before_core_merge: Run the promoted capability on regression case hsbc_00005_zh_to_en_pages_001_020.
Run independent spike validation without editing the framework.
Run anti-overfit scan against page-number, sample-text, and sample-value branches.
Update PDF_语义翻译回填_标准流程设计.md or its successor to match actual tool dispatch and repair-loop behavior.
